prompt: A cinematic, high-quality advertisement poster featuring two older Asian men sitting at a rustic wooden table in a warmly lit, moody environment. The man on the left has grey hair and a mustache, smiling enthusiastically, holding one glass of dark soda with a Pepsi logo. The man on the right has short hair and round glasses, looking forward with a subtle smile, holding one glass of dark soda with a Coca-Cola logo. Between them is one large, steaming dark ceramic pot filled with braised green beans and pork belly. On the table in the front left is one blue Pepsi can, and on the front right is one red Coca-Cola can. The poster features elegant, bold Chinese typography. At the top, a collaboration logo of Pepsi and Coca-Cola sits above the main headline 炖豆角 可乐. Vertical text on the left reads 赵本山 饰 马大帅 倾情代言. Vertical text on the right reads 范伟 饰 彪哥 倾情代言. At the bottom center, an ornate badge contains the tagline 东北硬菜 遇见经典, with smaller fine print below it. The lighting is dramatic, highlighting the steam rising from the food and the condensation on the cold drinks.
